title: Creamy Rice Pudding (Community Enhanced)
original_instructions: Bring water in a saucepan to a boil over medium heat; stir in rice. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Combine cooked rice, 1 ½ cups milk, sugar, and salt in a clean saucepan; cook over medium heat, stirring often, until thick and creamy, about 15 minutes.
Stir in remaining ½ cup milk, egg, and raisins; cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Off heat, stir in butter and vanilla extract until combined.
instructions: Bring water in a saucepan to a boil over medium heat; stir in rice. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Combine cooked rice, 1 ½ cups milk, sugar, and salt in a clean saucepan; cook over medium heat, stirring often, until thick and creamy, about 15 minutes.
Stir in remaining ½ cup milk, egg, and raisins; cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Off heat, stir in butter and vanilla extract until combined.
Divide the pudding into two containers for serving and presentation purposes.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and other desired toppings before serving.

line_diffs.reasoning: Reducing the amount of raisins to suit personal preference
Personal preference for extra creaminess and flavor

line_diffs.modified: Divide the pudding into two containers for serving and presentation purposes.
line_diffs.reasoning: Dividing the pudding into two containers for presentation purposes

line_diffs.modified: Sprinkle with cinnamon and other desired toppings before serving.
line_diffs.reasoning: Enhances flavor with cinnamon and other toppings

source_review.text: It should be noted to temper the eggs in. I did not, even though I added them at the same time as the milk. I've been picking tiny scrambled egg bits out of my yummy pudding lol I absolutely should have known better but was following the directions, too closely I suppose. I messed around with toppings and things after it was done. I felt it needed cinnamon and such. Great recipe with some tweaks!

modifications_applied.reasoning: Reducing the amount of raisins to suit personal preference

description: This rice pudding with golden raisins makes a comforting dessert that everyone will love. Serve warm with a sprinkling of ground cinnamon or nutmeg.
